name: agent:triage
description: AI evaluates issue alignment and readiness

name: agent:implement
description: AI may implement an approved issue

name: agent:review
description: AI reviews or fixes an agent PR

name: agent:proof
description: Run explicit proof or visual evidence flow

name: agent:automerge
description: Merge allowed after every required gate passes

name: agent:blocked
description: Automation needs human input or a failed gate

name: priority:high
description: Important or risky work; manual review required

name: priority:trivial
description: Owner opt-in: skip paid no-mistakes for trivial low-risk work

name: priority:low
description: Small low-risk work; cheapest automation path
